list_info.科目英文名: Special Topics in Human Resource Management

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 人力資源管理專題 (Special Topics in Human Resource Management　)	開課班級 : 企業管理學系碩一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 王興國	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
HRM semiar is designed for:1)graduate students enrolled in survey courses in human resource management who would benefit from a general management approach to strategic HR. 2)working professionals enrolled in specialized HR and executive programs as a capstone offering. and 3)undergraduate students enrolled in a capstone course in an HR degree program or those seeking an advanced level HR course to complement their HRM.  


2.教學綱要
The first section examines the context of strategic HRM and develops a framework and conceptual model for the practice of HRM. The second section examines the actual practice and implementation of HRM through a discussion of issues that need to be addressed while developing specific research ideas. 


3.教科書
4	書名 : Fundamentals of human resource management　
出版日期 : 2024年 月 
作者 : Noe, Hollenbeck, Gerhart, & Wright　出版社 : Mcgraw Hill　版本 : 10 


4.參考書
6	書名 : Human resource management　出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Wayne Mondy, Joseph J. Martocchio　出版社 : Pearson　版本 :

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Final assignment: 30%; Each week presentation: 70% 
This course will be taught in English. All students should present the HR topic in English.
